biggest_fears: I'm worried I'll burn out before we hit the next milestone
Scaling the team feels risky and I don't want to lose our culture
biggest_goals: I want to get to $5M ARR without doubling headcount
We're trying to build systems so the business runs without me
objections: It looks great but it's too expensive for where we are right now
I'm not sure another tool is the answer
desires: I'd love a business that runs without me having to be in every decision
misconceptions: How is this different from just hiring a COO?
Does this actually replace my existing stack?
favorite_content: Content like: "The teardown of how you systemized ops was the best thing I read all month"
Content like: "Loved the podcast episode on delegation without losing quality"
best_offers: A lower-risk entry offer (payment plan or trial) to defuse price objections
An outcome-guaranteed package tied to their stated goal
A premium 'done-for-you' offer matching their ideal scenario
messaging_recommendation: Lead by directly addressing the top objection: "It looks great but it's too expensive for where we are right now" — name it before they do.
